sources.label: Yahoo Finance - Graco Valco Melton acquisition coverage (May 21, pre-window)
Yahoo Finance - GGG news feed (no items since Jun 6)
MarketBeat - GGG analyst ratings (mixed PT moves, none dated Jun 8-9)

verdicts.rankRationale: Yesterday's verdict already pushed the name down to reconcile the adjusted-score rank; nothing material has emerged since June 6 and today's +1.75% move is routine, so the latent-node case is unchanged at rank 23.
verdicts.bull: Precision fluid metering/dispensing is genuine bottleneck-adjacent capability if liquid-cooling and thermal-fluid handling demand spills into Graco's industrial channel, and -8.7% YTD means the AI optionality is priced at zero.
verdicts.neutral: The AI pathway remains speculative with no disclosed datacenter coolant or thermal-fluid design wins; the May 21 Valco Melton deal ($447M, adhesives) deepens core industrial dispensing but adds nothing to the AI thesis.
verdicts.bear: Graco stays a cyclical industrial with mixed analyst PT cuts (RBC to $95, Baird to $92) and no evidenced AI revenue, so the latent-node score erodes if the coolant-handling pathway never materializes.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Any disclosed datacenter liquid-cooling or thermal-fluid handling order/partnership, or Valco Melton close (fiscal Q3) with AI-adjacent commentary.
verdicts.primaryRisk: AI linkage remains purely conceptual while industrial capex softness drags the core, leaving the name as dead weight on a strict latent-nodes screen.
